strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and technical leadership
Strong background in AI and cloud technologies through various projects
Diverse skill set including JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and experience with multiple technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience in AI strategy and cloud product development at a director level
No explicit mention of experience with AI-powered product development or MCP
Limited experience in advising strategic customers and partners on cutting-edge technologies
response.justification: The candidate has a strong technical background and diverse experience in software development, with some exposure to AI and cloud technologies. However, there is a lack of direct experience at a director level and in AI strategy.
